channel.title: Journal für die reine und angewandte Mathematik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal für die reine und angewandte Mathematik

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Winston Heap, Anurag Sahay DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/crelle-2025-frontmatter818

item.title: Geometric main conjectures in function fields

item.title: Geometry at infinity of the space of Kähler potentials and asymptotic properties of filtrations

item.title: The Nash problem for torus actions of complexity one

item.title: The fourth moment of the Hurwitz zeta function
